categories.name: Industrial Manipulators
categories.description: Robot-arm drivers, controller bridges, and ros2_control integrations for industrial and collaborative manipulators.

categories.name: Mobile Bases And Robots
categories.description: Drivers and platform package stacks for mobile robots and base platforms.

categories.name: Cameras And RGB-D
categories.description: Camera, RGB-D, and image pipeline packages used for perception bringup.

categories.name: LiDAR
categories.description: 2D and 3D LiDAR drivers and sensor wrappers.

categories.name: IMU And Positioning
categories.description: IMU, GNSS, inertial, and positioning sensor drivers used in robot state estimation.

categories.name: Grippers And End Effectors
categories.description: Drivers for grippers, end effectors, and related actuator interfaces.

categories.name: Control And Hardware Interfaces
categories.description: Core ROS 2 control frameworks, controllers, and generic hardware-interface packages.

entries.name: Universal Robots ROS 2 Driver
entries.description: Official ROS 2 driver for Universal Robots CB3 and e-Series arms, including controller communication and bringup packages.
entries.notes: Verify exact PolyScope, external-control, and ROS distro support upstream before deployment.

entries.name: Franka ROS 2
entries.description: ROS 2 integration packages for Franka research robots.
entries.notes: Confirm exact arm generation, libfranka version, and supported ROS distro upstream.

entries.name: FANUC ROS 2 Driver
entries.description: FANUC-maintained ROS 2 driver project for FANUC robot controllers.
entries.notes: GitHub API did not expose an SPDX license; confirm license, controller options, and supported robot models upstream.

entries.name: Kinova ROS 2 Kortex
entries.description: ROS 2 driver packages for Kinova Gen3 arms using the Kortex API.
entries.notes: GitHub API did not expose an SPDX license; confirm licensing, firmware, and supported distros upstream.

entries.name: xArm ROS 2
entries.description: ROS 2 packages for UFACTORY xArm robot arms.
entries.notes: Confirm model coverage, controller firmware, and branch/distro mapping upstream.

entries.name: Doosan Robot 2
entries.description: ROS 2 packages for Doosan robot arms.
entries.notes: Confirm controller software requirements and model coverage upstream.

entries.name: MotoROS2
entries.description: ROS 2 node for MotoPlus-compatible Yaskawa Motoman robot controllers.
entries.notes: GitHub API did not expose an SPDX license; confirm controller generation, MotoPlus requirements, and license upstream.

entries.name: KUKA RSI Driver
entries.description: ros2_control driver for KUKA arms using the Robot Sensor Interface.
entries.notes: Hardware use depends on KUKA RSI availability and controller configuration.

entries.name: TM ROS 2
entries.description: Experimental ROS 2 driver packages for Techman robots.
entries.notes: GitHub API did not expose an SPDX license; verify current branch, distro support, and model coverage upstream.

entries.name: AUBO ROS 2 Driver
entries.description: ROS 2 driver repository for AUBO robot arms.
entries.notes: GitHub API did not expose an SPDX license; confirm supported controller versions, models, and distro branches upstream.

entries.name: TurtleBot3
entries.description: ROS packages for TurtleBot3 mobile robots, including ROS 2 branches and platform bringup.
entries.notes: Check branch and distro documentation before use because ROS 1 and ROS 2 material coexist upstream.

entries.name: Clearpath Common
entries.description: Shared ROS 2 packages used across Clearpath robot platforms.
entries.notes: Use upstream platform docs to map this common package stack to a specific Clearpath robot.

entries.name: RealSense ROS
entries.description: ROS wrapper for Intel RealSense cameras.
entries.notes: Confirm supported camera models, librealsense version, and ROS distro branch upstream.

entries.name: ZED ROS 2 Wrapper
entries.description: ROS 2 wrapper for Stereolabs ZED cameras and the ZED SDK.
entries.notes: Confirm ZED SDK version, CUDA/platform requirements, camera model coverage, and ROS distro support upstream.

entries.name: DepthAI ROS
entries.description: Official ROS driver packages for Luxonis DepthAI and OAK sensors.
entries.notes: Confirm device model, firmware, DepthAI library version, and branch/distro mapping upstream.

entries.name: Zivid ROS
entries.description: Official ROS driver for Zivid 3D cameras.
entries.notes: Confirm supported Zivid SDK version, camera model, and ROS distro support upstream.

entries.name: Orbbec SDK ROS 2
entries.description: ROS 2 wrapper for Orbbec depth cameras using the Orbbec SDK.
entries.notes: Confirm supported camera models, SDK version, USB requirements, and distro branches upstream.

entries.name: USB Cam
entries.description: ROS driver for Video4Linux USB cameras.
entries.notes: GitHub API did not expose an SPDX license; inspect package license files and camera-specific V4L2 behavior upstream.

entries.name: Image Pipeline
entries.description: ROS image processing pipeline packages used by many camera stacks.
entries.notes: GitHub API did not expose an SPDX license; inspect package-level licenses and distro docs upstream.

entries.name: Velodyne
entries.description: ROS support for Velodyne 3D LiDARs.
entries.notes: GitHub API did not expose an SPDX license; confirm ROS 2 branch status, model coverage, and license upstream.

entries.name: SICK Scan XD
entries.description: Driver for a broad range of SICK LiDAR and radar devices with ROS support.
entries.notes: Confirm exact sensor family, launch configuration, fieldbus/network setup, and ROS 2 support notes upstream.

entries.name: SLLIDAR ROS 2
entries.description: ROS 2 driver repository for Slamtec SLLIDAR/RPLIDAR sensors.
entries.notes: Check upstream model coverage, serial/USB setup, and maintenance status before deployment.

entries.name: Livox ROS Driver 2
entries.description: ROS and ROS 2 driver repository for Livox LiDAR devices.
entries.notes: GitHub API did not expose an SPDX license; confirm device model, Livox SDK version, and ROS 2 branch instructions upstream.

entries.name: Ouster ROS
entries.description: Official ROS drivers for Ouster OS and OSDome sensors.
entries.notes: GitHub API did not expose an SPDX license; confirm firmware, sensor generation, and ROS 2 package support upstream.

entries.name: RoboSense LiDAR SDK
entries.description: RoboSense LiDAR SDK repository with ROS and ROS 2 support.
entries.notes: GitHub API did not expose an SPDX license; confirm sensor family, SDK mode, packet source, and ROS 2 instructions upstream.

entries.name: ROS 2 Ouster Drivers
entries.description: ROS 2 drivers for Ouster OS-series LiDAR sensors.
entries.notes: Check upstream activity and model/firmware support before use.

entries.name: MicroStrain Inertial
entries.description: ROS driver for MicroStrain inertial and positioning products.
entries.notes: GitHub API did not expose an SPDX license; confirm exact product family, transport, firmware, and ROS 2 branch support upstream.

entries.name: ROS 2 Robotiq Gripper
entries.description: ROS 2 integration for Robotiq grippers.
entries.notes: Confirm exact gripper model, transport, and controller integration upstream.

entries.name: Robotiq Hand-E Driver
entries.description: ROS 2 driver for the Robotiq Hand-E gripper.
entries.notes: Confirm hardware transport, firmware assumptions, and ROS distro support upstream.

entries.name: ros2_control
entries.description: Generic framework for ROS 2 controllers and hardware interfaces.
entries.notes: Framework entry, not a device-specific driver; use it to evaluate hardware-interface architecture.

entries.name: ros2_controllers
entries.description: Generic controller packages that accompany ros2_control.
entries.notes: Framework entry, not a device-specific driver; verify controller availability for the target ROS distro.
